title: Background memory agents (memdir): autoDream, MagicDocs, SessionMemory, PromptSuggestion
description:
Claude Code's memdir/ runs auto-triggered subagents that maintain project memory: autoDream (consolidation), MagicDocs (auto-docs), SessionMemory (per-session notes at ~/.claude/projects/X/Y/session-memory/summary.md), PromptSuggestion (speculative next-prompt prediction). OC has storage (memory.rs) but no maintenance loop.

## User-visible impact
- No /dream consolidation — memory grows unbounded
- No auto-generated project docs
- No session notes written as the user works
- No speculative prompt suggestions (slow feel on Enter)

## Scope
- src/memdir/ module
- Hook into session lifecycle to trigger autoDream on end
- Session-memory .md writer keyed on (project-dir, session-id)
- Prompt suggestion via forked subagent with tool-denial callback (cache-safe)
- Settings: lastProjectMemoryUpdate timestamp

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/memdir/
- /home/doll/claude-code-design-documents/.design/prompt-suggestion-speculation.md
